economic_notes: Forestry/logging operations through K'tipx Logging Ltd and Chuchuwayha Forestry Ltd. Natural resources and mining operations. Investments in Stuwix Resources JV (12.5%) and Vermilion Forks Community Forest Corporation (33.3%). COVID-19 impacts noted including reduced forestry demand.
notes: Consolidated entity includes 6 subsidiaries: Upper Similkameen Development Corporation, 0628957 BC Ltd., K'tipx Logging Ltd., K'tipx Logging Limited Partnership, Chuchuwayha Forestry Ltd., and Chuchuwayha Forestry Limited Partnership. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Stuwix Resources JV and Vermilion Forks Community Forest Corporation. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,564,689) + Other government from segmented schedule ($1,428,898) = $2,993,587. Annual debt service reflects principal repayments only; capital lease repayments of $115,722 also made. Fiscal year 2022, not 2024 as noted in document.
